allow: PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8766 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn[0].OwningProcess -Force -Confirm:$false; "old server stopped" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $req = [System.Net.HttpWebRequest]::Create\("http://localhost:8766/api/search?q=daft+punk+one+more+time"\); $req.Timeout = 40000; $req.ReadWriteTimeout = 40000; try { $resp = $req.GetResponse\(\); $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $lines = @\(\); $sw = [Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); while \(-not $sr.EndOfStream -and $sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds -lt 35 -and $lines.Count -lt 8\) { $l = $sr.ReadLine\(\); if \($l\) { $lines += $l } }; $resp.Close\(\); $lines } catch { "search FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8766 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn[0].OwningProcess -Force -Confirm:$false; "server stopped" })
